title: Latam: The Art of Navigating Currency Volatility
author: Federico Wajnerman
excerpt: Understanding FX risk in Latin America requires more than textbook knowledge. It demands an appreciation for regional nuance, institutional dynamics, and the temporal structure of exposure.

title: AI Agents and the LATAM Energy Transition: What Changes Now
author: David Trejo
excerpt: As AI agents begin to automate due diligence, risk monitoring, and regulatory tracking, the firms that deploy this infrastructure first will define the next decade of energy investment in Latin America.

title: When the Contract Works Against You
author: Maria Agustina Colloca
excerpt: An early-warning model for contractual index mismatch in construction finance. How AI identified a $525M projected loss with less than 1% deviation from the actual outcome — using projected indices, not observed ones.

title: Are We Still the Same Investors We Were?
author: Maria Agustina Colloca
excerpt: A financial and geopolitical intelligence model for dynamic portfolio evaluation in high-uncertainty environments. How to realign investment decisions when the world has fundamentally changed its rules.
